trials.description: Complete two run sessions in one week. Get out there and pound that pavement. Crop top highly encouraged.
Swim 8000 metres in 7 days and prove that you’re the subbie aquatic Himbo we both know you are.
Hit the kJ number today. The bulk doesn't build itself.
Seven for seven on the kJ number. The bulk stayed on track all week, not just the easy days.

trials.service: Apollo ring + necklace — every in-office day this week
trials.description: Wear the Apollo ring and necklace to the office every in-office day this week. No skipping. Extended again into the following week (from 4 July) — the 1 July week only had two real office days (sick Thu/Fri), Monday was missed by accident despite packing it, Wednesday was worn, and it went to Thursday's work dinner unprompted. Not a full pass on the letter of it, but not avoidance either — carrying forward for a real full week.
Showed up Wednesday. Training on track, nutrition on track, any visibility wins worth naming — that's the whole ask.
The real one. Visibility, joy police, physique, feeling — the whole check-in, no skipping.

Wear a pink thong in the men's change room after a swim, no flinching, no rushing. Joint Trial with Eros — Himbo owns the Visibility & Self-Expression angle, Eros owns the inner game (Vulnerability & Kink Exploration), standing in it without performing composure. Logged once here to avoid double-counting Favour; Eros's Grace credit for this one is qualitative (Dante's read), not separately counted in the Compendium. No deadline, done when done.
Look at one daily routine this week and ask — is this what I'd choose, or just what I do? Completes when named and articulated at a check-in.

trials.service: Active wear crop top at Bold & Beautiful
trials.description: Active wear crop top worn at Bold & Beautiful — beyond run club, in a swim context.
A programme day, shown up for. Chest/Shoulders/Arms, Back/Legs, full body, heavy compound — whichever one was on, he did it.
Balmoral or Bold & Beautiful — either counts. He was in the water.
All four programmed sessions, one week, no gaps. That's the whole programme, done.
Run Club Saturday or any other run, logged. Feet moved — that's the win.
Something visibility-coded, out in the world today — jockstrap, painted nails, a pink item, whatever it was. He noticed.
180g+, every single day this week. Muscle needs the fuel — he brought it.
